note: Shared golden vector for the OpenComputer bundle fileset digest (flue-slice.md contract 4, sha256 scheme). The fileset digest over RAW file bytes MUST equal `digest` in all implementations: cmd/oc filesetdigest (Go), sessions-api skill-bundle-canonical.ts (filesetDigest), oc-runtimes adapter-core skills.ts. Pre-image = u32be(count) then per entry (sorted by UTF-8 path bytes) sha256(content)[32] ‖ u32be(mode) ‖ u32be(len(path)) ‖ path_utf8; digest = 'sha256:' + hex(sha256(preimage)). `mode` is decimal (0o644=420, 0o755=493). `contentBase64` is base64 of the RAW file bytes — the fileset INCLUDES a binary PNG (skills/triage/logo.png), so any impl that decodes to a utf8 string before hashing diverges. Transport is a plain (non-canonical) tar.gz — the digest is over the unpacked fileset, so no tar bytes are pinned here.
